title: Dungeons Artifacts
body:
This mod adds [artifacts from Minecraft Dungeons](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Dungeons:Artifact).

**Requires GeckoLib**

Artifacts:

- Boots of Swiftness
- Corrupted Beacon
- Death Cap Mushroom
- Ghost Cloak
- Gong of Weakening
- Harvester
- Iron Hide Amulet
- Soul Healer
- Spinblade
- Updraft Tome
- Wind Horn
- Tasty Bone
- Lightning Rod
- Satchel of Elements
- Soul Lantern
- Totem of Regeneration

Some artifacts require souls to use. You must kill other mobs to get souls.
A soul bar on your HUD shows how many souls you have.

You can get artifacts by finding them in dungeons or by finding a jobless villager and placing an anvil (job site) near it
